intro.subtitle: There are memories that should remain erased...

chapter1.title: The Dark Beginning
chapter1.description: Your first day seems normal, until you discover the secret.

scene_1.text: Where am I? Everything seems to be spinning...

scene_2.text: You shouldn't be here. Run while you can.

scene_3a.text: Just a memory. Find the safe in the secret room.

scene_3b.text: You try to run, but your legs feel heavy. The ground gives way...

end.text: [ END OF CHAPTER 1 - Return to main menu ]

scene_1.text: You arrived. The room is dark and incredibly silent.

scene_2.text: Several flashes begin to appear in your mind. Strange figures...!
scene_2.choice_1: Try to focus on the vision

scene_3a.text: You managed to see me. The truth was always in front of you.

scene_3b.text: Darkness consumes everything. You lost your last chance.
